horoscope: The Sun moves into your sector of communications, learning, and errands today, dear Aries, where it will visit until June 21st. This transit can bring a busy pace of life, the chance to gather a lot of information, and more contact with others. This is a dynamic, bright, and connected area of your solar chart, and the Sun here puts the spotlight on communicating, learning, sharing, connecting, and getting out and about. You take more pride in these things, so improving your daily life, communication, and sense of connectedness will go a long way toward increased happiness and a sense of fulfillment. Today, while there can be some indecision, it's a good time to put out feelers and enjoy the exchange of information.

The Sun completes its yearly, month-long transit of your sign today, dear Taurus, and now begins its journey in your resources sector. This new cycle is a grounding one, lasting until June 21st. You’re shifting gears, and your focus is turning to your sense of security and comfort. You’re taking more pride in what you can produce, build, and create. It’s a great time to establish priorities and focus on them. Taking charge of your financial affairs is highly appropriate at this time of the year. It’s also a great time to explore or develop a natural talent or special project. Today, you can find it quite easy to become absorbed in your personal interests and projects, and perhaps even retreat into them for a pleasant spell.

With the Sun’s transit of your sign until June 21st, dear Gemini, your personality shines. This new cycle begins today. You’re more noticeable than usual and projecting more strength. You’re likely to be more talkative and expressive, and you can be busier than usual. The Sun also shines a spotlight on your personal needs and plans in the weeks ahead. Healthy self-focus is appropriate now, and others are noticing you more than usual. You’re in good shape to renew your personal goals and consider ways to improve your life. Ideally, you’ve had time for extra rest and deep thought in the past weeks and have a stronger belief in yourself with the start of a new solar year. Today, you are in a forward-looking mood and feeling a little more idealistic than usual. Your thinking is ahead of its time, and others may be seeing you for your intelligence and unique ideas and advice.

With the Sun’s move into your solar twelfth house today, dear Cancer, you’re turning more attention to your private, inner world until June 21st. More time set aside for relaxing, meditative activities can be in the spotlight in the weeks ahead. It’s a yearly, month-long cycle that is especially suitable for reflection, rest, and recollection. You are gathering your strength for busier times to come, but also reflecting upon recent events and shedding attitudes and situations that have run their natural course. As the final month of the solar cycle, the weeks ahead are excellent for wrapping things up. Extra rest will help balance things out. Use this time to take the load off, if possible. Keep in mind that, generally speaking, it’s not the best time to push yourself or your plans. You require more periods devoted to reflection on the activities and developments of the last year. It's the right time for forgiveness and letting go. Today is a good day to draw on your experience and inner wisdom to further a business goal.

Your social life can be animated in the weeks ahead, dear Leo, with the Sun’s move into your solar eleventh house. After special attention to performance and ambitions in recent weeks, your focus now shifts to an area of your chart that rules your social and humanitarian, or personal, happiness goals. This month-long cycle is usually quite supportive and pleasant. It’s a time to focus on plans, projects, and dreams, with satisfaction and fulfillment as the goals. You’re prioritizing the connections in your life during this cycle that lasts until June 21st. Today, injecting a little more imagination into what you're doing can be satisfying and even quite necessary to keep your interest. You may be showcasing your knowledge, whether or not you're trying to impress! It just seems to come naturally now.

In recent weeks, there has been a stronger focus on learning, exploring, and experiencing life, dear Virgo, but now your attention shifts to more material or ambitious concerns with a new Sun transit starting today. The Sun moves to the top of your solar chart, and it will visit your solar tenth house until June 21st. You’re more noticeable and taking more pride in what you do, which fuels your motivation to excel. In the coming month, there can be a lot of attention to your accomplishments, performance, ability to take the lead, and responsibilities. It’s an excellent time to recognize your priorities or need for more structure in your life. It can also be a period when you are more likely to be recognized for your efforts. Today, your thinking along financial and work or business lines is especially clever.

You're ending a rather introspective phase today and shifting gears as you enter a new Sun cycle that can be inspiring, dear Libra. The desire to share your philosophy or unique perspective on a matter can be powerful in the weeks ahead. Until June 21st, you’re in great shape to learn new things, explore different ideas and topics, share ideas, and discover new ways to express yourself. It’s an excellent time for expanding your experiences and interests. There can be a stronger desire to better your situation in life in meaningful ways or to reach towards a higher level of freedom and well-being. Activities that nourish the soul and spirit are especially significant and attractive. Today, a relationship can expand as you share your ideas, and in fact, there has been excellent energy for attracting love and friendship into your life through shared intellectual interests and your own unique visions and perspectives.

Today, the Sun moves into your intimacy sector for a stay of a month, dear Scorpio, and your general focus is shifting. Until June 21st, you pay more attention to more profound and intimate matters, and you’re more interested in digging deep than skimming the surface of things. Your private life assumes more importance, and you take greater notice of the less obvious elements of the circumstances and people around you. You stand to discover new things regarding your own personal psychology, relationships, and deeper interests. There may be a strong focus on shared money or resources in the weeks ahead. You are more intense in your mood and disposition at this time of year. Fortunately, you're likely to enjoy a strong period for observation, strategy, and insight. Today, helpful information seems to be circulating around you, and although it's not the most decisive days, there is no shortage of interesting ideas.

Today, you leave a cycle in which work and routines often dominated your attention, dear Sagittarius, and enter a period of a focus on social or partnering matters. The Sun begins its transit of your partnership sector today, and until June 21st, relationships take on greater importance in your life. Through feedback, you gain a more holistic view of yourself and your life. You look at things from two sides, and you’re more aware of imbalances. Ideally, you’re eager to make changes to restore order to your life. It’s time to make adjustments and compromises as you work toward a better work-life balance. Today, conversations with people you care about are notable, but also with people who can help you see your own feelings and ideas more clearly! Discussions can be especially friendly, helpful, open, and rewarding now.

You're beginning to pay more particular attention to the details, dear Capricorn, as the Sun moves into your solar sixth house for a visit until June 21st. It can be a period of renewed energy for work and routines. While it’s not the best time for recognition or worldly success, the weeks ahead are potent for self-development and laying the groundwork for future success. You can be exceptionally busy getting your life into better order. Taking charge of your work, chores, wellness, and health routines is rewarding now that you have awakened to the need to lead a more organized, productive, and healthier lifestyle. It’s an important time of the year for making improvements and updates to those systems in your life that have fallen out of alignment or that no longer serve you as well as they once did. Today, solid energy is with you for solving personal problems and finding solutions for work and family matters.

The Sun moves into your sector of joy today, dear Aquarius, and until June 21st, this transit helps you reconnect with your inner child. You’re experiencing a shift from a strong focus on your personal and home life to more creative and entertaining pastimes, creative expression, or romance. In the weeks ahead, you can be inspired creatively and emotionally. A stronger urge is with you to create, put your talents to use, show others what you can do, and experience and enjoy love. It's a supportive, helpful, and mostly happy influence, and it's a time to shine for creativity, warmth, and companionability. Today, you might make a positive connection or enjoy communication breakthroughs. Problem-solving skills are especially strong.

With the Sun’s move into your solar fourth house today, dear Pisces, a busy period gives way to a need for more peace, comfort, quiet, and familiarity. The weeks ahead are important for reconnecting to your roots, building your inner confidence, and taking charge of your family life. This Sun cycle encourages a stronger focus on your domestic world until June 21st. Improving your home and feelings of safety, security, and comfort can be in the spotlight. Loved ones can motivate you to succeed, build, and organize. It’s a natural time for anchoring on a psychological level. Today, there is plenty of inspiration to draw upon with the information coming into your world. Influences help conversations and thinking flow pleasantly.
